scripts.test:m0.5: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build && pnpm run test && pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/m0.5 --workers=1
scripts.test:m1-media: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build && pnpm run test && pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/m1-media --grep-invert "@staging|@private-assets"
scripts.test:e2e:staging: BASE_URL="${BASE_URL:?BASE_URL is required for staging e2e}" PLAYWRIGHT_NO_WEB_SERVER=1 playwright test --grep @staging
scripts.test:e2e:rutube: BASE_URL="${BASE_URL:?BASE_URL is required for Rutube e2e}" PLAYWRIGHT_NO_WEB_SERVER=1 playwright test --grep @rutube --workers=1
